articles.headline: Welcome to AutoPress: an AI-native editorial engine
articles.subheadline: This is a seeded report included so the homepage renders on first deploy. A scheduled GitHub Action can refresh this store daily.
articles.body:
AutoPress is an AI-native news surface designed around reporting-quality articles, produced via an automated pipeline. To keep deployments reliable on serverless platforms, this publication can be served from a daily snapshot (store.json) generated outside the request path.

Once you configure the pipeline keys in GitHub Actions, a scheduled job can generate a fresh edition each day and commit it to the repository. Vercel then serves the latest edition instantly for all readers.

This seed is intentionally transparent: it is a demo safeguard, not live reporting.
keyPoints: A static store snapshot prevents blank pages on deploy.
Run the pipeline daily in GitHub Actions and commit store.json.
Vercel renders the snapshot for everyone.
articles.pullQuote: A daily snapshot makes serverless publishing reliable.
articles.angle: Why daily snapshots make serverless reliable.
articles.context: Long-running generation pipelines should not run inside user-facing serverless requests.

digest.headline: Getting started
digest.summary: Set GitHub secrets and enable the daily workflow to generate a new edition.
